skills.name: signal-triage
skills.description: Layer 2 of the signal-triage-notify system. Hourly LLM sweep that classifies new situational-awareness items and proposes actions into the ledger.

skills.name: signal-notify
skills.description: Layer 3 of the signal-triage-notify system. Dispatches pending actions (calendar writes, alerts) and bundles the Layer-1 sensor framework.
